content.query:
-- Openrowset Extended

SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
ORDER BY COUNTRY ASC;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE AS
SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10 AS
WITH TOP_RANKED AS (
SELECT 
COUNTRY, 
ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE_USD) DESC) AS RN
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
)
SELECT
COUNTRY,
TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM TOP_RANKED
WHERE RN < 11;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10;

CREATE VIEW PLAYER_CLUB AS
SELECT
PLAYER.PLAYER_ID,
PLAYER.[NAME] AS PLAYER_NAME,
PLAYER.country_of_birth,
PLAYER.country_of_citizenship,
CLUB.*
FROM OPENROWSET(
BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/players.csv',
FORMAT = 'CSV',
HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
AS PLAYER
INNER JOIN OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/clubs.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS CLUB
    ON PLAYER.current_club_id = CLUB.club_id

SELECT * FROM PLAYER_CLUB;
